# Test Case Design - BatteryMgmt

High-level test cases for the **BatteryMgmt** architecture model. Battery Management System: cell monitoring, state of charge, balancing and contactor control.

---
## Test Case: TC.001 - cellmon init & cyclic

**Given** the ECU has powered on
**When** `Bms_Cellmon_Init` then `Bms_Cellmon_Step` are called
**Then** the phase becomes RUN and `value` is a filtered, clamped sample (REQ-BMS-CEL7)
